no: SoD ending mod by jastey. Installs after EndlessBG1 — may get @10012 journal bleed from EndlessBG1. Non-critical (cn:1 installs with warnings). cn:1 alpha bug: missing @10012 translation

conflicts.reason: SoD ending components are mutually exclusive; Another Fine Hell tp2 uses FORBID_COMPONENT for Jastey's ending variants (cn 12-15). Install one or the other.
conflicts.myComps: #0 Another Fine Hell - Optional Ending for SoD
conflicts.theirComps: #12 Revised Full Version / #13 Revised Streamlined / #14 Original Streamlined / #15 Skipit Version

conflicts.reason: Reflections of Destiny cn:200 ('Rewriting History') rewrites SoD Caelar backstory and narrative. Another Fine Hell also modifies BG1-to-SoD transition. Users report dialogue inconsistencies when both installed.
conflicts.source: User report shaigan G3 topic 38225, Feb 2026

sum: Adds a planar quest involving Baatezu and Tanar'ri politics. Visit a slice of the Nine Hells with new areas and fiendish encounters.

co.n: Another Fine Hell - Optional Ending for SoD and BGII Closure
co.tp2n: Another Fine Hell - Optional Ending for SoD and BGII Closure
co.no: Optional alternative ending for SoD and BGII closure.

co.n: Get the Hells Out - Quest Option with Extended BGII Content

co.n: PC's and Imoen's chest in Palace should have their content
